mapper.select: SELECT N.user_nickname AS 닉네임, COUNT(A.VOLUN_ACT_NO) AS 총봉사횟수, NVL(SUM(V.VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME - V.VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME), 0) AS 총봉사시간, NVL(R.RANK_POINT, 0) AS 랭킹포인트, NVL(C.TOTAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS 현재포인트 FROM TBL_USER N JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A ON N.USER_NO = A.USER_NO JOIN TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY V ON A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = V.VOLUN_ACT_NO JOIN TBL_RANKING R ON N.USER_NO = R.USER_NO JOIN TBL_CURRENCY C ON N.USER_NO = C.USER_NO WHERE N.USER_NO = #{userNO} GROUP BY N.user_nickname, R.RANK_POINT, C.TOTAL_AMOUNT
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_user SET user_nickname = #{userNickname}, user_email = #{userEmail}, user_pw = #{userPw}, user_phone_num = #{userPhoneNum}, user_address = #{userAddress}, user_address_detail = #{userAddressDetail}, user_postnum = #{userPostnum}, WHERE user_no = #{userNo}

UPDATE tbl_user SET user_email = #{userEmail}, user_pw = #{userPw}, user_address = #{userAddress}, user_address_detail = #{userAddressDetail}, user_postnum = #{userPostNum}, user_phone_num = #{userPhoneNum} WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND user_type = 2
mapper.select: SELECT log_reason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), change_amount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_no = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC
SELECT log_reason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), change_amount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_no = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC
